name: NPC
description: A simplified AI system for creating non-hostile non-player characters with basic roaming and idle behaviors. NPCs can stand still or wander within a defined area, responding to player proximity with state transitions and animations. Simpler alternative to Enemy behavior, focused on ambient life and non-combat interactions.
documentation:
## NPC
Create non-player characters that roam or stand in the scene.

### Movement
- **Movement Type** - Stand Still or Roam
- **Movement Speed** - Walking speed
- **Roam Distance** - How far the NPC wanders
- **Engage Distance** - Range to interact with the player

### Stats
- **Health** - NPC hit points (default: 100)

### Animations
Assign animations: Idle, Walking, Running, Jumping, Crouching, Tripping, Falling, Dying, Attacking.

### Tips
- For AI-powered conversation NPCs, use the **AI NPC** behavior instead
- Great for ambient characters like villagers or shopkeepers
- Combine with NavMesh for intelligent pathfinding
author: stemstudio

movementType.name: Movement Type
movementType.description: Controls whether the NPC stays in place or wanders around its starting position.

health.name: Health
health.description: Hit points for the NPC. The NPC dies when health reaches 0.

movementSpeed.name: Movement Speed
movementSpeed.description: Walking speed of the NPC in units per second when roaming.

roamDistance.name: Roam Distance
roamDistance.description: Maximum distance in units the NPC can wander from its starting position.

engageDistance.name: Engage Distance
engageDistance.description: Distance in units at which the NPC detects and reacts to the player.

idleAnimation.name: Idle
idleAnimation.description: Animation to play when the NPC is standing still.

walkAnimation.name: Walking
walkAnimation.description: Animation to play when the NPC is walking.

runAnimation.name: Running
runAnimation.description: Animation to play when the NPC is running.

jumpAnimation.name: Jumping
jumpAnimation.description: Animation to play when the NPC is jumping.

crouchAnimation.name: Crouching
crouchAnimation.description: Animation to play when the NPC is crouching.

trippingAnimation.name: Tripping
trippingAnimation.description: Animation to play when the NPC trips or stumbles.

fallAnimation.name: Falling
fallAnimation.description: Animation to play when the NPC is falling.

dieAnimation.name: Dying
dieAnimation.description: Animation to play when the NPC dies.

attackingAnimation.name: Attacking
attackingAnimation.description: Animation to play when the NPC is attacking.
